title: Public prepared food catalog import
summary: 식약처 가공식품 영양 표준데이터를 검수된 local public product catalog로 batch 승격한다.
goal: 10,000개 이상 공공 제품 파일럿과 전체-valid 확장, immutable version, local-only search를 안전하게 구현한다.

owners.claude: replaced for this nutrition slice by explicit user approval
owners.codex: role-separated Codex sessions own docs, implementation, and independent review

dependencies: nutrition/products public-sharing official contract PR #1026 merged at 403bf16c50cc4fd35c88a10510b4a216e866f991

required_checks: pnpm exec vitest run tests/public-prepared-food-import.test.ts tests/public-prepared-food-import-postgres.integration.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-api.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-rls.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm exec vitest run tests/public-prepared-food-import.test.ts tests/public-prepared-food-import-postgres.integration.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-api.test.ts tests/prepared-food-catalog-rls.test.ts

out_of_scope: community manual public sharing and moderation
frontend source badges and 100g quantity UX
notes: Current official snapshot evidence is 20260626/298271 rows; the immutable run manifest revalidates source facts at execution time.
